title: Caviar is selling a ridiculous Lionel Messi-themed Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra a week before its official unveiling - Engadget
summary: Samsung's next big Galaxy Unpacked event is still a few days away. Granted, because the phone has yet to be officially announced, we're still waiting on official pricing from Samsung regarding the cost of a regular Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra.
